title: Merge CSV Files into YAML List
cap_description: Merge multiple CSV files into a single YAML sequence of mappings
documentation:
## Purpose

Merges a sequence of CSV files into a single YAML sequence of mappings, with each row becoming a YAML mapping and column headers becoming keys. Use this when downstream processing prefers YAML.

## Inputs

A sequence of CSV files (each with a header row and data rows).

## Outputs

A YAML sequence where each element is a mapping with keys from the CSV header.

## Notes

- All input CSVs should have compatible headers.
- For JSON output, use [Merge CSV Files into JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:csv;list;record;textable";op=collect_records;out="media:json;list;record;textable").

output.output_description: YAML sequence with all CSV rows as mappings
